community.explainer: Add friends and get tickets together.

slide1.text2: All productions and events of the Schaubühne at a glance. Create wish lists and favorites and be the first to be informed.
slide1.title: What’s new here?*

slide2.text2: This is how quick and easy it is to get your ticket. No printing, everything directly in this app.
slide2.title: I want it to be quick.*

slide3.text2: Go to the theatre together. Connect with your friends or find a theatre companion.
slide3.title: I will wait until everyone is here.*

slide4.text1: Recommend the app to your friends and receive a welcome bonus.
slide4.title: Many new features are waiting for you in the future.

info.both:
Invite your friends to use the Schaubühnen-App app and both receive {{rewardSender}} credit for your next ticket purchases.

You can redeem your bonus as soon as your friends have completed their first purchase.

Only applies to the referral of new customers (one invitation per registered user, independent from downloads and installed devices). Redeemable for order values of at least {{minimumPayment}}. A maximum of {{maxUsesPerLink}} invites per user.
info.sender:
Invite your friends to use the Schaubühnen-App app and receive {{rewardSender}} credit for your next ticket purchase for every new customer you have referred.

You can redeem your bonus as soon as your friends have completed their first purchase.

Only applies to the referral of new customers (one invitation per registered user, independent from downloads and installed devices). Redeemable for order values of at least {{minimumPayment}}. A maximum of {{maxUsesPerLink}} invites per user.

description.different: Invite your friends to Schaubühnen-App. For every successfully invited new customer you will receive a credit of {{rewardSender}}. And your friends get {{rewardReceiver}}.
description.senderonly: Invite your friends to Schaubühnen-App. For every successfully invited new customer you will receive a credit of {{rewardSender}}.

message.1: {{name}} has invited you to the {{appName}} App.

voucherpurchase.description: Still looking for the perfect gift or a surprise for a special someone in your life? Pick a gift amount and create your own certificate.
